mission: Run HSD like a women’s sports desk: story graph first, exact assets, deterministic prompts, multi-sport coverage, Threads volume, Instagram quality.
hard_rules: No player graphic unless every required player image is exact and mapped.
No invented player faces, bodies, jerseys, or logos.
No generic social volume on Instagram feed; Threads carries volume.
Breaking/rumor content requires verification state and source label.
Prompts compile from canonical content packets only.
